title: More Ore Stones [Fabric]
description: Ore variants for each type of vanilla stone
body:
Does pretty much what you'd expect!


This mod simply adds Granite, Andesite, Diorite, and Tuff stone bases for all of the vanilla overworld ores; 

Coal, Iron, Copper, Gold, Redstone, Lapis, Emerald, and Diamond.

That makes 32 new ore blocks to spice up caves or be used as neat decorations.
